programme.title: Talaash: The Hunt Begins¡¦
programme.desc: Young Arjun¡¯s father gets killed by mafia and they also take away his younger sister. Afterwards, his mother also goes insane. Vowing revenge, Arjun grows up to be a high-profile vigilante for police and sets out on a mission to find his sister.

programme.title: Fever
programme.desc: Armin Salem loses his memory in an accident and only remembers his name. One day, he starts getting visions of a murder and fears that he might have committed the crime, until he meets a woman who helps him uncover the truth. But can she be trusted?

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: When the Municipal Corporation puts a hold on Sachin Tichkule's payment, a berk but ambitious municipal contractor, he decides to sue them. But matters worsen when the new municipal commissioner turns out to be his former girlfriend.

programme.title: Captain
programme.desc: V P Sathyan, a professional Indian footballer, goes through various ups and downs in his career as he strives hard to fulfil his ambitions.

programme.title: Woh Ek Din
programme.desc: An entire day is wiped off the memory of Sahasra and she only realises the fact when unidentified men try to kill her. She must now race against time to piece together that one missing day which has thrown her life out of order.

programme.title: Citizen
programme.desc: Antony assumes several identities and kidnaps three government officials in order to succeed in his secret mission. However, a CBI officer sets out to find the real identity of the kidnapper.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: High Up in the Jura Mountains
programme.desc: There is so much to discover in the Swiss Jura mountains. It's is a natural landscape with many facets.

programme.title: Through the Seasons in the Jura Mountains
programme.desc: The Jura region in the Swiss Romandy has a surprisingly diverse natural landscape.

programme.title: Lake Maggiore
programme.desc: Great crested grebes and lizards are evidence of just how wild nature can be at Lake Maggiore.

programme.title: Wild Ticino
programme.desc: Ticino, an area of Northern Italy, has an immensely varied natural landscape.

programme.title: Graubuenden in Winter
programme.desc: Ibex, marmots, and common vipers all have different strategies for surviving winter's icy grip.

programme.title: Along the Aare River
programme.desc: Explore the Aare, the longest river whose entire course lies within Switzerland.

programme.title: The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: Nature in the Bernese Oberland is marked by pretty alpine meadows with colorful flowers and rugged rocks.

programme.title: Days of Eternal Light
programme.desc: In summer, one of the coldest regions on earth turns into a paradise for animals.

programme.title: A Summer With Polar Bears at Hudson Bay
programme.desc: This episode accompanies the polar bears during the ice-free, colorful summertime.

programme.title: Summertime Wilderness
programme.desc: During its brief summer, Hudson Bay offers ideal living conditions for numerous animals and plants.

programme.title: Season of New Beginnings
programme.desc: Stocking up energy and breeding are the major challenges for wild plants and animals that accompany spring.

programme.title: Time for Awakening
programme.desc: For wild animals in Central Europe, early springtime is time to gain energy and produce offspring.

programme.title: Autumn and Winter
programme.desc: The traditional mixed orchard is a crucially important cultivated landscape, especially in fall and winter.

programme.title: Spring and Summer
programme.desc: In spring and summer, the orchard meadow reveals an invaluable habitat for the local flora and fauna.

programme.title: A Wolf's Journey
programme.desc: Driven out of his pack, a young wolf has to face his fate alone and try to survive in a world ruled by man.

programme.title: Survival of the Fittest
programme.desc: Learn how the crocodile, shark, and whale evolved over millions of years to become modern masters of survival.

programme.title: Dolce Vita
programme.desc: A Series of stories following a week in the life of a philandering tabloid journalist living in Rome.

programme.title: DOMESTIC
programme.desc: Domestic is a story about people who eat the animals they love and animals who love people unconditionally. A rabbit, a hen, a cat, a dog and a dove pass through the lives of the main characters and influence their evolution.

programme.title: Don't Fade Away
programme.desc: Life was easy for Jackson White (RYAN KWANTEN). With looks, brains, and athletic ability, the possibilities seemed endless. But when he came to New York City to pursue a career in the music industry, he was so seduced by money and status that he lost track of who he was. Now, with both his personal and professional lives on the brink of disaster, he retreats home to care for his dying father (BEAU BRIDGES). While in North Carolina, he confronts the friends he lost track of and the girl he left behind (MISCHA BARTON).

programme.title: Early Summer
programme.desc: A family chooses a match for their daughter Noriko, but she, surprisingly, has her own plans.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies

programme.title: VIP Pets

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills

However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf

The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit
programme.desc: Say storm chasing and people think destructive tornadoes and ferocious winds, but those are only a few of the dangerous elements storm hunters Mark and Jaclyn encounter when pursuing extreme weather.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong
programme.desc: Canada's weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia's back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Peak Intensity
programme.desc: Mark hikes up Mount Washington, New Hampshire, the highest peak in the Northeastern US and battles one of the most dangerous mountains in the world at its peak intensity.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | 1000 Year Storm

programme.title: Mission

programme.title: Mission

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Wild Ride

programme.title: Past, Present, Future

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: On this episode we travel from the desert, to the forest, Australia to Borneo and back to learn how species as diverse as Bat-eared Foxes, the Bilby, Deer, Kangaroo Rats, cicadas, Proboscis Monkeys and other creatures never miss an auditory trick.

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There are senses we share with most animals, but what about those senses that human is equipped with? Infrared light, electromagnetic waves and ultrasound, are all found within a spectrum of sensory information that just passes by ordinary humans.

programme.title: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral in Varna, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral is the largest cathedral of Varna and one of the most impressive sites in the city. With its height of 38 meters, the Dormition of the Mother of God is one of the tallest churches in Bulgaria and certainly one "&"of the most important in the country's long history.

programme.title: Plovdiv, The city on seven hills, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Few places have a history like Plovdiv. Its hilly landscape bears the marks of many great civilizations – from the mysterious Thracian tribes, to ancient Greece and Persia, to the Roman Empire, all the way to the Bulgarian Empire, the Ottomans and even Ts"&"arist Russia. In fact, Plovdiv is one of the oldest cities in Europe.

programme.title: Ethno Village-Museum Ljubacke Doline, Bosnia & Herzegovina
programme.desc: Exploring different cultures and experiencing lives utterly different from yours is the best part of discovering new horizons. This kind of experience can be done in one particular place in Bosnia & Herzegovina called Ljubacke Doline. Well, you can transl"&"ate it literally by Kisses Valley. This place is one of the many Ethno villages in the region.

programme.title: Tigre, the Puerto de Frutos, Argentina
programme.desc: The architectural ensemble of Tigre's rowing clubs is a World Heritage site. The unique factor was the pluralism of nationalities and cultural trends that existed in Argentina at the beginning of the 20th Century, something evident in the architectural ex"&"pression…
